Certified Tesla & EV Installer

Electrical Panel Upgrades in Chicago, IL

Older panels can't handle today's electrical demands — EV chargers, heat pumps, and modern appliances need more power. We upgrade your panel to 200A or 400A service, ensuring your home is safe, up to code, and ready for the future.

Get a Free Estimate (773) 706-0609
